library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: State document in Arabic on recto, very wide line spacing. Medieval-era. The remnants of two partial lines are visible. Both sides were reused for a literary text in Hebrew. This fragment may have been cut from the same document that appears in the neighboring shelfmark ENA 4048.4. MCD.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
